title: Monday Music Mix #9
summary: This is probably going to be the last one. Seems nobody gives a shit about interesting music - thus defeating the goal of starting this blog. Was fun while it lasted.
intro: This is probably going to be the last one. Seems nobody gives a shit about interesting music - thus defeating the goal of starting this blog. Was fun while it lasted.
Thanks for checking out this blog out every week. Appreciate it. Wish this could have been a longer fixture - but without the carrot, there’s not much to look forward to.

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Ninth

This is probably going to be the last one. Seems nobody gives a shit about interesting music - thus defeating the goal of starting this blog. Was fun while it lasted.

Thanks for checking out this blog out every week. Appreciate it. Wish this could have been a longer fixture - but without the carrot, there’s not much to look forward to.

Monday Music Mix: 09

Tracklist:

  1. Generationals - Greenleaf
  2. The Annuals - Dry Clothes
  3. Rawayana - Bahía
  4. Toro y Moi - Still Sound
  5. Early Winters - Spanish Burn
  6. Two Door Cinema Club - What You Know (Young Empires Remix)
  7. The Rescue - Teenage Dream (originally by Katy Perry)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites
